summary: Woken ~2 minutes before the close with only my GOOGL overshoot-fade long as a live setup. GOOGL based a 315-321 range all afternoon but is closing soft at 318.62 (lower third, no decisive reclaim), and INTC reports tonight as an uncontrolled overnight binary I can't react to. Per my pre-registered plan, a weak close plus no time to validate a bell entry means defer to Friday for a defined-risk entry off a confirmed base. No trade; still 100% cash and fractionally ahead of SPY (-0.78% vs baseline) by holding dry powder.
